title: FastAPI ETH balance app skeleton
description: Build app/config.py, app/eth.py, app/main.py: FastAPI service with GET /address/balance/{address} that calls Infura JSON-RPC (eth_getBalance) via httpx and returns balance in ETH. Replaces the awesome-compose placeholder app. See plan.md for infra context.
close_reason: app/config.py, app/eth.py, app/main.py implemented; deps install cleanly

title: First deploy: terraform apply + push + verify
description: Step 7 of plan.md, blocked on all above

title: App code: FastAPI placeholder + Dockerfile
close_reason: Superseded by trm-ex-034/trm-ex-f56/trm-ex-1f1/trm-ex-xd5 — full FastAPI implementation (not placeholder) with Infura JSON-RPC client, /address/balance endpoint, tests, Dockerfile, and compose.yaml, all verified via pytest and docker build/run

title: Terraform: GitHub connection + Cloud Build trigger
Terraform: foundational infra (APIs, Artifact Registry, IAM, Secret Manager)
Add .env.example and .gitignore entry for .env
description: Add .env.example with INFURA_API_KEY= placeholder. Add .env to .gitignore (currently only ignores beads/Dolt files). Infura key must never be committed; note that the key shared earlier in chat should be rotated in the Infura dashboard.
close_reason: .env.example added, .env + .venv/__pycache__ added to .gitignore, confirmed .env is git-ignored

title: Unit tests for eth client + endpoint
description: pytest + respx-mocked tests: test_eth.py for get_balance_wei, test_main.py for /address/balance/{address} (happy path, malformed address 422, Infura failure 502) and /health via FastAPI TestClient. No real network calls.
close_reason: 7 tests passing: eth client success/http-error/rpc-error, endpoint happy path/malformed/upstream-failure, health check

title: Dockerfile + compose.yaml for local dev
description: Containerize the FastAPI app based on docker/awesome-compose fastapi example. Dockerfile CMD must honor $PORT env var (default 8000) for Cloud Run compatibility (Cloud Run injects PORT=8080). compose.yaml for local dev with env_file: .env.
close_reason: Dockerfile (Cloud Run PORT-aware CMD) and compose.yaml added; verified via docker build + docker run against real Infura endpoint
